originalTitle: Instagram is finally letting everyone reorganize their profile grid
summary: Nearly a year after it was announced, Instagram says it's delivering the ability to rearrange the posts in your profile grid. It had been available to some people in test groups, but as of June 8th, it's rolling out widely via the Android and iPhone mobile apps. Until now, the posts on your Instagram profile […]
content: Nearly a year after it was announced, Instagram says it’s delivering the ability to rearrange the posts in your profile grid. It had been available to some people in test groups, but as of June 8th, it’s rolling out widely via the Android and iPhone mobile apps. Until now, the posts on your Instagram profile have been locked in chronological order beyond the ability to pin three posts at the top, but once the feature is live on your account, you can long-press and drag posts freely, no matter how old they are. Any posts that are pinned will remain at the top. [Media: https://www.instagram.com/p/DZVLSAfG4vO/?img_index=2] Instagram boss Adam Mosseri announced the change in January of last year, with an apology to users whose carefully crafted profile pages had been wrecked when the app switched from square thumbnails to taller, more vertically oriented ones. His post today simply says “Finally,” even though the comments would suggest there are a few other changes Instagram users would like to see that they’ve been waiting to see, even longer than the release of a native iPad UI. [Media: https://www.instagram.com/p/DZVYyHoEc1m/]
chineseTitle: Instagram 终于让每个人都可以重新组织自己的个人资料网格
chineseSummary: 发布近一年后，Instagram 表示它正在提供重新排列个人资料网格中帖子的功能。它已经向测试组中的一些人开放，但截至 6 月 8 日，它正在通过 Android 和 iPhone 移动应用程序广泛推广。到目前为止，您 Instagram 个人资料上的帖子 [...]
chineseContent: Instagram 宣布推出近一年后，它表示将提供重新排列个人资料网格中帖子的功能。它已经向测试组中的一些人开放，但截至 6 月 8 日，它正在通过 Android 和 iPhone 移动应用程序广泛推广。到目前为止，你的 Instagram 个人资料上的帖子已按时间顺序锁定，无法将三个帖子固定在顶部，但一旦该功能在你的帐户上启用，你就可以长按并自由拖动帖子，无论它们有多旧。任何固定的帖子都将保留在顶部。 [媒体：https://www.instagram.com/p/DZVLSAfG4vO/?img_index=2] Instagram 老板 Adam Mosseri 在去年 1 月宣布了这一变化，并向用户道歉，当应用程序从方形缩略图切换到更高、更垂直的缩略图时，他们精心设计的个人资料页面被破坏了。他今天的帖子只是简单地说“终于”，尽管评论表明 Instagram 用户希望看到他们一直在等待的其他一些变化，甚至比原生 iPad UI 的发布还要久。 [媒体：https://www.instagram.com/p/DZVYyHoEc1m/]
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
